rulings.Case Title: SENTINEL INSURANCE COMPANY, VS. DMS BUILDERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Restaurant Design Concepts, Inc.'S Motion For Summary Judgment Against Sentinel Insurance Company
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 31, 2018, Line 2. Defendant Restaurant Design Concepts, Inc.'s Motion For Summary Judgment Against Sentinel Insurance Company. GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and the opposing side failed to dispute any material facts. Insurer cannot maintain a cause of action against its insured when its equitable position is inferior to that of the insured. Truck Ins. Exchange v. County of LA (2002) 95 Cal.App.4th 13. It is undisputed (Fact 11) that the insured was covered for "products-completed operations" and opposing part failed to present facts or evidence that this coverage did not include coverage for loss suffered by Plaintiff's other insured, Presidio. National Union Fire Ins. v. Engineering-Science, Inc. (1989) 884 F.2d 1208. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC VS. CATHERINE HERRERA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 31, 2018, Line 7. DEFENDANT CATHERINE HERRERA'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. DENIED. Defendant's motion lacks any supporting evidence. Defendant fails to attach a copy of the Summons and Complaint with "personal service" box checked allegedly service on her via posting and mailing. Defendant also fails to cite any authority for the proposition that otherwise valid serve is ineffective due to the "personal service" box being checked. =(501/REQ)
